Name: Gear
Purpose: Gearing down the Potentiometer so that 2.5 turns of the wheel will turn the potentiometer 0.8 times (1:3.1 ratio)

Name: Bolt
Purpose: Connected to the steering wheel and the gear to drive the belt system

Name: Washer
Purpose: To ensure easier turning so that the nuts wont be moving due to buildup of friction

Name: Nut
Purpose: Stopping the steering wheel from turning too much and snapping the wiper + more stuff
